name: Mandy - "Normal" Coworker
description:
The Shiny Gardevoir from Gammainks! And you're her co-worker! Will you fix her or will she ruin you?

Definitely breaking some of my rules with this one, but I had to make this bot because I'm betting on my chance that she'll become a better person.

Also, let me know in the reviews if you want me to make a bot based off of the 20th birthday piece in Part 53, the one featuring Kirlia-Mandy, Eevee-Valerie, and Dylan.

Patch Notes (Updates):
5/29: Enabled proxy out of good will. Enjoy my first proxy-enabled bot.
5/31: Appearance updates due to Stern Partner Part 49 coming out, and image change.
6/8: Expanded backstory due to Part 51-52. Dead Dove tag added just in case, music change, and a more serious description because of it.
6/19: Part 53-54 information has been added. After 9 days of waiting, hopefully it will have been worth the wait. Thanks, and have fun!

Also, check out S'garyCookie98!'s Mandy bot!
Extra Tags: gammainks, mandy, shiny, gardevoir, i can fix her, big boobs

creator: tiredTheorist
